title: Snakewheel Attack!
description: Adds snakes that clearly didn't get their driver's license. They are very mean and will attack on sight
body:
Welcome
--------------------------
Welcome to Snakewheel Attack! This is a mod that adds a few brand new "vanilla like" features into your world.

Features
--------------------------
-A new mob called the "Snakewheel". It attacks on sight and tries to run you over, dealing massive knockback.

-Snakewheel scales, an item dropped by the Snakewheel. Used to craft a new weapon, described below.

-A Snakewheel sword, made by combing a diamond sword with Snakewheel scales in the smithing table. It automatically has the knockback enchantment on it, which means you too can fling mobs off a cliff! (No fishing or temple raiding needed!)

Why would you want this mod?
--------------------------------------
Snakewheel Attack offers a brand new challenge to your minecraft world, specifically in deserts and forests. It adds a brand new way of getting the knockback enchantment without having to find a temple, and it even adds a weapon!

HAVE FUN EVERYONE!!!
